home.tip1: Recycling 1 ton of paper saves 17 trees and 7,000 gallons of water!
home.tip2: Recycling plastic saves 50L of water per kg. Every drop counts!
home.tip3: Recycling aluminum uses 95% less energy than making new cans from raw materials.
home.tip4: E-waste contains precious metals like gold and silver. Recycling recovers them!

community.quote2: Your waste can become someone's resource 🌱
community.quote3: Together, we build a cleaner future 🌍
community.quote4: Every small step counts towards a greener planet 🌿
community.quote5: Recycle today for a better tomorrow ✨
community.awareness1: Segregate your waste at source: wet, dry, and hazardous. It makes recycling 3x more efficient!
community.awareness2: Only 9% of all plastic ever produced has been recycled. Your actions make a real difference.
community.awareness3: Flatten cardboard boxes before recycling — it saves 60% more space in collection vehicles.
